_note: Curated A/B set — deliberately small and mixed-sector. Regime diversity matters (paper-analysis critique #1): the reference paper evaluated 3-5 mega-caps over a single 3-month bull window. A point-in-time snapshot like this CANNOT prove behavior across bull/bear/sideways regimes; treat sector spread here as a partial mitigation, not a substitute for multi-regime backtesting. Add more tickers / re-run across dates to strengthen claims.
